title: SPECTRAPLAST® 50L Kitchen Bin - Black Plastic Touch-Top Waste Recycling Bin with Removable Lid, Large Capacity for Home, Office, Under Counter Waste Disposal, Fingerprint Resistant, Easy Touch-Top
features: GENEROUS 50L CAPACITY – Ideal for family kitchens, busy offices, and utility areas, the large bin capacity ensures fewer trips to the outside bin.
TOUCH-TOP HYGIENE CONTROL – Spectraplast’s innovative press-top lid allows for hands-free waste disposal, promoting a cleaner and more sanitary environment.
BLACK FINISH – FINGERPRINT RESISTANT – The elegant smooth black surface resists smudges and fingerprints, maintaining a fresh, sleek appearance in any kitchen decor.
FINGERPRINT-RESISTANT BLACK FINISH – Elegant black plastic complements any kitchen decor while effectively resisting fingerprints, smudges, and marks.
REMOVABLE LID FOR EASY MAINTENANCE – The top lid lifts off effortlessly for fast liner replacement and deep cleaning, making upkeep simple and efficient.
RECYCLING MADE SIMPLE – Promote sustainable living with Spectraplast’s bin design that supports easy segregation and disposal of recyclable materials.
HEAVY-DUTY BUILD FROM SPECTRAPLAST – Made from durable plastic that resists cracking and warping, the bin is built to withstand daily household or commercial use.
UNDER COUNTER FIT DESIGN – Tailored to fit neatly under standard kitchen counters or worktops, maximising floor space while remaining fully functional.
MULTI-ENVIRONMENT USAGE – Whether in a kitchen, office, bathroom, or utility space, the Spectraplast 50L bin serves reliably across various settings.
SPECTRAPLAST QUALITY ASSURANCE – Designed by Spectraplast, a trusted name in household solutions, this 50L kitchen bin blends modern aesthetics with premium durability.
description: Keep Your Kitchen Clean, Organised, and Stylish The Spectraplast 50L Kitchen Recycling Bin is the ultimate solution for efficient and stylish waste management in your home. Crafted specifically for UK households, this large-capacity recycling bin seamlessly combines convenience, hygiene, and aesthetic appeal. Hassle-Free Touch-Top Mechanism Say goodbye to messy pedal bins or manual lids. Our press-top design is simple to operate with a single touch—perfect for busy families and kitchen environments. Built to Last Made from durable, fingerprint-resistant matte black plastic, this bin effortlessly withstands daily use while maintaining its sleek appearance. Easy to clean, it remains immaculate without constant polishing. Space-Saving Design With its versatile 50-litre capacity, the bin fits comfortably beneath standard kitchen counters, making it perfect for homes, offices, schools, and other spaces where efficient waste management is essential. Promotes Recycling at Home Encourage responsible waste sorting effortlessly. Its clearly identifiable design helps promote eco-friendly practices, assisting you in organising recyclable materials effectively. Upgrade your kitchen today with the Spectraplast 50L Touch-Top Kitchen Recycling Bin—your practical, stylish, and hygienic waste solution.
